headline: EA SPORTS™ College Football 27 Launches Worldwide, Bringing New Era of College Football to Life
summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., July 09, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) today launched EA SPORTS™ College Football 27 worldwide on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S and, for the first time ever, PC and mobile. Following the record-breaking return of the franchise, College Football 27 raises the bar once again, delivering the most authentic college football experience yet.

content.title: EA SPORTS™ College Football 27 Launches Worldwide, Bringing New Era of College Football to Life

thumbnail.caption: College Football 27 captures real world elements that impact gameday like never before.
